style_constraints: single row strip left to right

states.brief: subtle chest breathing, no foot movement
heavy plodding stride, body bobs, arms swing low
arm pulls back wide, orange glow builds on fist, body coils
explosive horizontal swipe, arm at full arc, orange glow at peak
arm retracts, weight returns to centre, back to combat idle
sharp body recoil backward, head snaps back
staggers, collapses, cracked gate energy fades out

variants.palette_note: Use base palette only: grey/brown, cracked gate energy skin.
Zone variant palette only: red-tinged rust and bruised darker tones; gate energy cracks more aggressive.

enemies.base_palette: dark body, white-blue crystal glow focal point

states.brief: subtle breathing, crystal glow pulses very slightly
light cautious stride, body upright, crystal steady, nimble quality
lateral shuffle, body faces forward, crystal arm raised and aimed
urgent backward shuffle, crystal arm stays raised and aimed throughout
crystal charges from dim to full glow, body locks on target
arm thrusts forward, crystal flares at maximum, bolt fires, crystal dims
arm retracts, crystal recharges from dark back to idle pulse
sharp flinch backward, crystal flickers dark then returns faintly
staggers, crystal extinguishes, body folds and collapses

variants.palette_note: Use base palette only: dark body with white-blue crystal glow.
Zone variant palette only: crystal glow must be deep purple; body materials unchanged.

enemies.base_palette: dark stone and metal ore plating, 2x player height

states.brief: very slow heavy breathing, massive chest expands, feet planted
slow thunderous stride, body weight shifts dramatically side to side
arms raise slowly overhead, deep red aura builds to maximum
both fists slam downward, deep red aura peaks on impact
hunched post-slam, slowly straightens, vulnerable window
both arms thrust forward wide, yellow outline flash on hands at extension
massive body barely moves, slight shoulder recoil, ore plating crack flash
ore plating cracks glow then go dark, body tips slow and heavy, crashes

variants.palette_note: Use base palette only: dark stone and metal ore plating.
Zone variant palette only: void-touched ore / blackened stone tones; structure unchanged.
